# MuleSoft Microsoft Dynamics 365 For Finance and Operations Connector

> LLM-friendly index for the latest version (3.1) of Microsoft Dynamics 365 For Finance and Operations Connector documentation.
> See [Microsoft Dynamics 365 For Finance and Operations Connector llms-full.txt](https://docs.mulesoft.com/microsoft-365-ops-connector/llms-full.txt) for all the Microsoft Dynamics 365 For Finance and Operations Connector documentation in one file.

## Content

- [Microsoft Dynamics 365 for Finance and Operations Connector 3.1](https://docs.mulesoft.com/microsoft-365-ops-connector/latest/index.md)
- [Microsoft Dynamics 365 for Finance and Operations Connector 3.1 Additional Configuration Information](https://docs.mulesoft.com/microsoft-365-ops-connector/latest/microsoft-365-finance-operations-connector-config-topics.md)

- [Using Anypoint Studio to Configure Microsoft Dynamics 365 for Finance and Operations Connector 3.1](https://docs.mulesoft.com/microsoft-365-ops-connector/latest/microsoft-365-finance-operations-connector-studio.md)
- [Upgrading and Migrating Microsoft Dynamics for Finance and Operations Connector to Version 3.0](https://docs.mulesoft.com/microsoft-365-ops-connector/latest/microsoft-365-finance-operations-connector-upgrade.md)
- [Microsoft Dynamics 365 for Finance and Operations Connector 3.1 - XML and Maven Support](https://docs.mulesoft.com/microsoft-365-ops-connector/latest/microsoft-365-finance-operations-connector-xml-maven.md)
